path.style: fill: #000000; fill-opacity: 1;fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 1; fill-rule: evenodd; stroke: none; stroke-width: 0; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-000000, #ffffff); --darkreader-inline-stroke: none;

stroke: #00ff00; stroke-width: 1px; fill: none;fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 163, 41); stroke-width: 2px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-miterlimit: 4; --darkreader-inline-fill: none; --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-000000, #ffffff);
